response.overview: Created alongside the mini album of the same name, "CROSSWORDS" follows a man working a dead-end 9 to 5 after never pursuing his love of music. One day in the office, he spots a crumpled up piece of paper on the ground: a crossword puzzle... offering a cash prize. Down on his luck, the man takes it home and completes it, eager for any opportunity to turn his life around. Upon completion, he is transported to an alternate universe where he's a global, chart-topping pop-star. For 24 hours, an unknown presence watches as he experiences his dream life of fame, fortune, and romance. Once the 24 hours are up, he is left with a decision: go back to his life in the office cubes, or live out his "perfect" life of fame. —Braydon Dayne
response.title: Crosswords
